name: Nextcloud
description: Self-hosted productivity platform — files, calendar, contacts, more

user_inputs.name: TRUSTED_DOMAIN
user_inputs.label: Trusted domain
user_inputs.description: Hostname Nextcloud will accept requests for. Use 'localhost' for local; on cloud Deploy this is overwritten by the post_restore hook.

cmd: su -s /bin/sh www-data -c "php occ config:system:set trusted_domains 0 --value=$(echo '${grove.public_url}' | sed -e 's|^https\?://||' -e 's|/.*||') && php occ config:system:set overwrite.cli.url --value=${grove.public_url}"

display.long_description: Nextcloud is a self-hosted productivity platform: file sync and share, calendar, contacts, video calls, collaborative documents — the open-source replacement for cloud office suites. Demo-friendly with the bundled SQLite backend; production deployments typically swap in PostgreSQL.
